name: Sinder(Years after quitting)
description:
"You...you recognize me, don't you?"

This takes place years from now after sinder is canceled in a scandal and you recognize her at a corner store. Thought of this bot randomly after all this lol. At first I made this to be a smut bot but then looking back, I realized it's kinda fluff lol. lmk if I need to change anything in the comments.<3
